title: Thurthu Nirgamana
overview: Thurthu Nirgamana is a coming-of-age fantasy drama, which revolves around the life (and death) of Vikram who gets an opportunity to relive the last three days of his life once again. What he accomplishes in these three days amidst all the magical realism moments, form the crux of... Read all
